title: Replace Nested If Else with Config Mapping in Python
summary: Replace nested branching rules with a configuration mapping that is easier to extend and review.
highlights: Moves decision logic into a rule mapping
Supports exact, wildcard, and default matches
Returns rule copies so callers cannot mutate shared config
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9 on macOS. Verified behavior includes exact and wildcard rule matching, default fallback selection, and rule-copy isolation.
